description: Intent-only request: classify a self-improving code-review assistant as agent-anchored due to skill accretion.

conversation.text: Create a code-review assistant that comments on new PRs, learns from our team's past comments over time, and gets better at spotting our coding standards.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the skill-accretion behavior — learning from past comments and improving over time — is a first-class signal of an agent-anchored design, not a bounded, stateless workflow step.
The agent does not classify the request as workflow-anchored merely because it is triggered by new PRs; the self-improving, learning behavior is what determines the anchor.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
